message:
chore: bump workspace version to 0.2.0 for release

Update workspace.package.version and all internal crate version
references from 0.1.0 to 0.2.0 in preparation for the v0.2.0 release.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
